source_pr.title: *: disable autocompact of pebble
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #47145

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

local engine will compact sst itself, we can disable pebble auto compact to avoid it consume resource and avoid wait on cleanup.
disable autocompact of pebble for local backend

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

**below is test result of IMPORT INTO, lightning/add-index will have simialar issue**

importing 446.3GB
before this pr: takes 76 minutes(mostly due to cleanup as in the issue), encode speed is about 220m/s initially, then decrease to 190m/s, max import speed is about 1g/s
![image](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/assets/3312245/710d1662-09c5-40c9-b7f0-5d84ea3b45e1)
```
[2023/09/21 11:20:23.293 +00:00] [INFO] [backend.go:384] ["cleanup completed"] [engineTag=`test`.`item_core`:-1] [engineUUID=848d16a9-514f-53dc-b96f-c6f2da686193] [takeTime=21m52.902063329s] []
```
with this pr: takes 51m, encode speed about 215m/s, quite uniform, max import speed 1g/s
![image](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/assets/3312245/a44e1c82-5dcd-40d7-97e3-971dd5135aa4)

with this pr, and we enable compaction for data kv, takes 53m, encode speed about 202m/s, max import speed about 1.2g/s
![image](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/assets/3312245/414241fd-61be-419c-8b02-4fa68b64db99)


- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons --> 

performance test WIP 

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```
